description_text:
Inogen One G5 Portable Oxygen Concentrator

Inogen One G5 is a pulse flow portable oxygen concentrator imported from the USA which provides oxygen up to 6 pulse flow settings at the purity level of above 90%.

Lightweight and Easy to Carry: Inogen One G5 weighs only 2.16 kgs and is the lightest portable oxygen concentrator in the world. 

Battery Backup: At two pulse settings, Inogen One G5 gives a battery backup of 6.50, higher than any other portable concentrator. The device gives 13 hours of backup with an external battery.

Recharge Time: It takes three hours to fully recharge the battery of Inogen One G5.

Operating Altitude: This portable oxygen concentrator has an operating altitude of 10000 feet.

Outlet Pressure: The machine has an outlet pressure of 28.9 psi.

Sound Level: The machine produces negligible sound at 38 dB.

Alarms: Loss of Power, system malfunction, no flow alarm

Certifications: Inogen One G5 is FAA and FDA approved and is CE Certified.

Warranty: 2 years warranty the machine and 6 months on battery and accessories

What's in the Box?

Inogen One G5 unit 

8 cell or 16 cell Battery (Depending on the variant you choose)

DC Cable for use in a car

AC Power supply 100-240V, 50-60Hz

Sling bag to carry machine on shoulder

User manual
